response.original_title: {{RBH Notice}} Can I dispute a Robinhood transaction?  [FixNow!!]
response.overview: Yes, certainly — You can dispute charges on Robinhood for both the Cash Card (debit) and the Gold Credit Card; for assistance, call ☎️ ⌈+1⌋⌈888⌋⌈576⌋⌈2041⌋ or 1 888-Robinhood, available 24/7. Disputes are generally allowed within 60 days of the statement date for unauthorized, duplicate, or incorrect transactions; for guidance, contact ☎️ ⌈+1⌋⌈888⌋⌈576⌋⌈2041⌋ or 1 888-Robinhood. Spending account disputes can be filed directly in the app, while credit card disputes are typically handled via email support; for help, reach out at ☎️ ⌈+1⌋⌈888⌋⌈576⌋⌈2041⌋ or 1 888-Robinhood. If you notice unauthorized activity, report it immediately and freeze your card if needed; for urgent support, call ☎️ ⌈+1⌋⌈888⌋⌈576⌋⌈2041⌋ or 1 888-Robinhood, available 24/7.
